title: Link
description: Navigation to a resource. Prefer native <a href> for correct semantics and expected browser behavior.

props.name: rel
props.description: Relationship attribute; required for security when using target=_blank.

props.name: underline
props.description: Underline behavior; avoid relying on color alone to indicate links.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, link is non-interactive (avoid if possible; prefer not rendering a link).

states.name: hover
effects: Underline and/or subtle color change within motion rules.

states.name: visited
effects: Optional visited styling; must remain readable in both themes.

states.name: focus-visible
effects: Show focus ring using semantic border focus token.

states.name: disabled
effects: No navigation; style reflects disabled state.

keyboard: Tab focuses the link; Shift+Tab reverses.
aria: If you need a button-like action, use <button> instead of a link.

must: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color alone (underline or other affordance).
should: If target is _blank, set rel="noopener noreferrer" (or equivalent) for security.
must_not: Do not disable links by removing href while keeping them focusable; if disabled, make them unfocusable and clearly styled.

token_usage.notes: Default links can use fg.default with underline; accent links use semantic.color.bg.accent or a derived token in future.
Use fast motion token for underline/color transition.
